title: Property Consultant - DLF - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - DLF - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at DLF are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About DLF:
DLF is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DLF!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
